bridge.description: Bridge view with orange pole on right side

SA_to_LS.description: Lane next to orange pole (right side of image) - vehicles coming FROM South Africa

LS_to_SA.description: Lane away from orange pole (left side of image) - vehicles going TO South Africa

canopy.description: Canopy/Processing area view - shows vehicles queuing and processing

SA_to_LS.description: Left side under green roof - SA vehicles queuing to enter Lesotho (1-2 rows when busy)

LS_to_SA.description: Right side area - LS vehicles heading toward bridge/South Africa

canopy.notes: Trucks in canopy area process elsewhere - they don't cause delays for cars

engen.description: Engen/Wide view - shows approach road from Lesotho side

LS_to_SA.description: Main road queue area - cars heading to SA (narrow strip following road)

engen.notes: Engen is used as queue INDICATOR, not for counting. If vehicles detected here = queue stretches past Engen = SEVERE. Excludes truck parking areas.
